prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SVT-SOUTHWESTSOCKS-0113-BLU Product Type: SOCKS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Blue Navajo Mens Socks Hiking Gear Camping Accessories, 1 Pair Description: Keep your toes toasty when adventuring, hiking or camping in the wilderness. ASR Outdoor Aztec and Navajo inspired mens socks are made with a polyester spandex blend, making them super soft, comfortable against your skin, more durable than cotton or wool socks and of course, will keep feet warm.

With a nod to Navajo and Aztec design, these mens socks are timeless, classic and suitable to wear during all seasons. And, if you're not packing these socks with your hiking or camping gear, they're a comfy option for lounging at home or at the cabin or cottage; just add your favorite hot beverage or glass of whisky, a good book and cozy blanket to initiate afternoon nap sequence. These hiking socks feature 3% spandex for stretch and elasticity and will cover ankles and shins up to about ten inches; one size fits most.

ASR Outdoor Navajo inspired mens socks make awesome stocking stuffers or gifts for boyfriends, Dad's, brothers, or for any outdoor enthusiast in your life, whether for hiking, camping, trail running, post ski or snowboard lounging and much more. Search Terms: athleisure boyfriend gifts apparel cottage southwest decor Oregon trail Nordic socks secret santa travel winter boots camp walking running shoes trekking survival gear prepper supplies Features: - SOUTHWEST DESIGN: With a nod to Navajo and Aztec design patterns, these socks are timeless, classic and suitable for all seasons; available in blue, green, beige or brown colorways and will cover ankles and shins up to about 10 inches - UNIVERSAL FIT: ASR Outdoor mens socks feature 3% spandex for stretch and elasticity; they come one size fits most for standard US sizing - CAMPING ACCESSORIES: Stay warm in the wilderness or on the trail with ASR Outdoors Aztec Navajo inspired mens socks; featuring a polyester spandex blend, these hiking socks are soft, comfortable, very durable and will keep feet warm - STOCKING STUFFERS FOR MEN: If you're not packing these socks with your hiking or camping gear, they're a comfy option for lounging at home or at the cabin or cottage; Great stocking stuffers for men - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 3.5 x 1 inches; Weight: 0.14lbs; Colors: Assorted; Care: Machine Wash Cold, Hang Dry === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Blue Navajo Mens Socks

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 1-Pair Mens Blue Hiking Socks

anthropic.title_differentiation: Southwest Design, Polyester Spandex Blend, Hiking And Camping, One Size Fits Most, Warm And Durable

openai.title_differentiation: Southwest Navajo Aztec Pattern, Polyester Spandex Blend, Warm And Durable, One Size Fits Most, Great Stocking Stuffer
